_comment: Third-party shell/taskbar modifiers that conflict with our Explorer tweaks. If any listed installed-app name or running process is detected, skip the classic-menu override (they already patch the shell) and warn the user before touching taskbar/widgets/search keys — they may fight for the same settings.

conflicts.reason: StartAllBack already restores classic context menu and taskbar; our override fights it.
ExplorerPatcher owns shell customization; our tweaks will be overridden or crash Explorer.
Stardock Start11 manages taskbar/start menu itself.
Open-Shell replaces Start menu and often the context menu.

defaultActionOnDetection.skip_classic_menu: Do not write the {86ca1aa0-...} InprocServer32 empty-string override.
defaultActionOnDetection.warn_taskbar_tweaks: Ask user before applying TaskbarAl / SearchboxTaskbarMode / TaskbarDa — the third-party tool may snap them back.
